name: Echidna Wars Mini RPG
description:
CW: Vore, Digestion

A bot based off of Echidna Wars Mini

In this bot, you can find different companions to help you on your journey. Despite the bot being based off Echidna Wars Mini, the allies you can find are from Echidna Wars DX

It might be difficult to defeat monsters solo, as this bot was designed with having allies in mind. If you want a solo experience, I have another bot called Echidna Wars DX RPG designed for solo play that you can find Here

If you want to purely roleplay with these characters, check out my Echidna Wars Squad bot Here

Latest update: Added Slimefolk and Jellyfish Person, who are reskins of Slime and Jellyfish respectively (I decided to branch out a bit from the source material given that there aren’t many monsters left to add and these were easy and only took few tokens)

Dang, over 100 chats and 3.5k messages in just a week? Thank you! I’m planning to do more updates, so feel free to leave suggestions on monsters and/or changes you’d like to see

Ally List (Personalities are likely non-canon and based on other bots I’ve seen of them):

Mirea (Average HP; both an average damage melee attack and a low damage ranged attack)

Sachiho (Average HP; hard-hitting melee attack)

TGO-07 (High HP; average damage melee attack)

Usaco (Low HP; hard-hitting ranged attack)

Monster List (Only 7 for now, planning on adding more):

Lamia (Coiling, Pseudo-oral vore)

Slime (Absorption)

Jellyfish (Tentacles, Pseudo-oral vore)

Worm (Oral vore)

Arachne (Web bondage, Pseudo-oral vore)

Harpy (Choking, Unbirth)

Lizardfolk (Oral vore)

Puki (Oral vore)

Lambda (Web bondage, Oral vore)

(PS: Pseudo-oral vore means the monster uses an unconventionally-placed mouth to vore, but it’s still a mouth)
creator: HistoricalHello12
